summary: Looks like Compose UI is finally addressing a long-standing issue on Android where the experience of scrolling nested lists hasn't felt as good as on iOS. https:// issuetracker.google.com/issues /269627294#comment7
content:
Looks like Compose UI is finally addressing a long-standing issue on Android where the experience of scrolling nested lists hasn't felt as good as on iOS.

https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/269627294#comment7
